hero.title: Morocco,
hero.subtitle: Curated tours, signature excursions and premium private transfers across the Kingdom — with a team that has been guiding travellers for over 35 years.

sections.tours_title: Multi-day tours, designed by people who live here
sections.excursions_title: Half-day and full-day escapes from Agadir
sections.excursions_subtitle: Hand-picked nearby gems — easy to add to any stay, easy on time, never on wonder.
sections.transfers_subtitle: A discreet, modern fleet — driven by experienced local chauffeurs who know every road.
sections.story_title: Travel that feels written, not booked.
sections.story_body: Bo Voyages was founded on a simple idea: Morocco deserves to be experienced slowly, by people who know its rhythm. From the souks of Marrakech to the dunes of the south, every itinerary is hand-shaped by our team — and every transfer is operated by drivers we know and trust.
sections.story_body_2: We don't sell trips off a shelf. We sit with you, listen to what you love, and build a route that moves at your pace — quiet riads, family-run kitchens, the right guide for the right city. Three decades in, that's still the only way we know how to work.
sections.newsletter_title: Quiet inspiration, four times a year.
sections.newsletter_body: Seasonal itineraries, hidden corners, and gentle journal notes from our team. No noise.

tours.title: Multi-day tours of Morocco
tours.subtitle: Hand-built circuits from 4 to 12 days, with private vehicle and driver-guide.

excursions.title: Day excursions from Agadir
excursions.subtitle: Half-day and full-day escapes — perfect for adding a day of magic to any stay.

transfers.title: Private transfers across Morocco
transfers.subtitle: From a discreet 7-seat minibus to a 48-seat luxury coach. All prices are per vehicle, one-way.

booking.subtitle: Three quiet steps. We reply within a few hours, in your language.
booking.name: Full name

confirmation.title: Thank you. Your request is in our hands.
confirmation.subtitle: We have received your request and will reply within a few hours.
confirmation.step_1: Our team reviews your request and confirms availability.
confirmation.step_2: You receive a personalised quote and itinerary by email.
confirmation.step_3: Once you approve, we lock in your dates and chauffeur.

about.title: Travelling Morocco, gently.
about.subtitle: Three decades of quiet expertise.
about.body_1: Bo Voyages began in Agadir in 1989 with a small fleet of vehicles and a clear conviction: travel in Morocco should feel intimate, not industrial.
about.body_2: Today we operate across the Kingdom — from the imperial cities of the north to the deserts of the south — with the same family approach. Every booking is met by a real person, every itinerary is shaped by hand, and every chauffeur is part of our team.

contact.title: Talk to a real person.
contact.subtitle: Phone, email, or WhatsApp — we reply within a few hours.
contact.name: Your name

footer.tagline: Premium travel & private transfers across Morocco — since 1989.
